ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match. */,
  "challenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who initiated the challenge. */,
  "challenged_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was challenged. */,
  "challenger_score" INTEGER /* Score of the challenger in the match. */,
  "challenged_score" INTEGER /* Score of the challenged player in the match. */,
  "finished" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match has been completed (1 for finished, 0 for ongoing). */,
  "expire_date" TEXT /* Date when the challenge expires if not completed. */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the match. */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played. */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time when the match was played. */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match winner. */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., practice, tournament). */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled). */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_challenged_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenged_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_challenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenger_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player. */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the platform. */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player in the leaderboard. */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication. */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile image. */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the player. */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the player. */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account (e.g., active, suspended, banned). */,
  "preferred_games" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of the player's preferred games. */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements or badges earned by the player. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the challenge. */,
  "challenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who initiated the challenge. */,
  "challenged_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is being challenged. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the challenge (e.g., pending, accepted, declined). */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the challenge was created. */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the challenge. */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., casual, ranked). */,
  "challenge_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the challenge expires if not accepted. */,
  "challenge_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the challenge in minutes. */,
  "challenge_description" TEXT /* Description or additional details about the challenge. */,
  "challenge_status" TEXT /* More detailed status of the challenge (e.g., pending, accepted, declined, cancelled). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_challenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenger_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_challenged_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenged_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tournament. */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament. */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament. */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament. */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the tournament. */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament organizer. */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the tournament. */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Prize pool amount for the tournament. */,
  "registration_fee" INTEGER /* Registration fee for the tournament. */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the tournament. */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament bracket (e.g., single elimination, double elimination). */,
  "current_round" INTEGER /* Current round of the tournament. */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the tournament. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification. */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the notification. */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message. */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent. */,
  "viewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been viewed (1 for yes, 0 for no). */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., match start, challenge, tournament update). */,
  "notification_source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, player, tournament). */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read. */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is important (1 for yes, 0 for no). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
